name: Eritrea → Europe (via Ethiopia/Libya)
subtitle: Eritrea → Europe
description: Eritrean migration to Europe is primarily driven by indefinite national service, which amounts to forced labor, and severe political repression. Most Eritreans transit through Ethiopia and Sudan before crossing the Sahara and Mediterranean, often via Libya. The journey is extremely dangerous — thousands have died in the Mediterranean. Eritreans are among the top nationalities granted asylum in Europe, with large communities in Germany, Sweden, and the UK.
